name: Flex Ltd.
description: Flex Ltd. is a global manufacturing, design, and technology services company that delivers innovative solutions to a diverse range of industries, including automotive, cloud, communications, consumer devices, healthcare, and industrial. Operating in dozens of countries, Flex provides sketch-to-scale services, helping customers design, build, ship, and manage products globally. The company focuses on advanced manufacturing, supply chain solutions, and sustainable operations to drive efficiency and value for its partners.
